_doc: Pi-pinned snapshot of get_commands RPC + prompt-templates + skills surface at SHA 734e08e.

data_shape.description_derivation: frontmatter.description OR first body line (truncated to 60 chars)

prompt_templates_surface.frontmatter_parsing: YAML between --- delimiters at file start; uses npm `yaml` package

file_formats: SKILL.md files at ANY directory depth (returns IMMEDIATELY upon finding one in a dir)
Root .md files in top-level directory only
discovery.directory_traversal: RECURSIVE for SKILL.md (stops at first hit per dir)
discovery.ignore_pattern_prefixing: relative paths from ignore file location

skills_surface.frontmatter_parsing: YAML at file start; required fields: name (matches parent dir), description; optional: disable-model-invocation
validation: name MUST match parent directory name
name character restrictions (lowercase a-z, 0-9, hyphens only)

get_commands_handler_aggregation.name_prefix_convention: Skills are prefixed with 'skill:' in the wire shape

aelix_current_state.extension_source_info_exists: ExtensionSourceInfo dataclass at extensions/api.py:481 (Pi SourceInfo minimal port)
aelix_current_state.get_registered_commands_on_extension: NOT YET SURFACED — Sprint 6h₁ adds it as Extension API

python_port_strategy.ignore: pathspec library (mature pure-Python gitignore matcher; pin `pathspec>=0.12`)
python_port_strategy.fs_abstraction: Use Path + open() directly; no ExecutionEnv abstraction needed (Pi's ExecutionEnv is for browser/Node interop)
python_port_strategy.diagnostic_codes: Literal Python unions; same string values as Pi

python_deliverables.harness_aggregation: ~50 prod LOC (Extension.commands + harness.prompt_templates + harness.skills attribute wire)

deferred_in_sprint_6h_1: 16 remaining RPC commands (steer/follow_up/cycle_thinking_level/queue modes/auto modes/abort_bash/session inspection/session tree/extension UI) — Sprint 6h₂
Pi `ExecutionEnv` browser-side abstraction (Aelix uses direct stdlib io)
